attributes.description: Can Fin Homes Ltd. is a deposit-taking housing finance company (HFC) registered with National Housing Bank (NHB).Canara Bank holds 29.99% stake in the company. It primarily provides relatively smaller ticket-sized housing loans to salaried & professional and self-employed non-professional (SENP) borrowers.[1]

Can Fin Homes Ltd. is a deposit-taking housing finance company (HFC) registered with National Housing Bank (NHB).Canara Bank holds 29.99% stake in the company. It primarily provides relatively smaller ticket-sized housing loans to salaried & professional and self-employed non-professional (SENP) borrowers.[1]
